add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF Using FileSpecification
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF and embed a single file attachment by creating a FileAttachmentAnnotation with a FileSpecification using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-file-attachment-in-pdf.title: Embed a File as an Attachment in a PDF
embed-file-attachment-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a FileSpecification from a byte array and add it as a file attachment annotation to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Attachments to PDF
add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, validating file paths, and embedding several external files as attachments using Aspose.Pdf.

set-attachment-description-and-mime-type.title: Set Custom Description and MIME Type for PDF Attachments
set-attachment-description-and-mime-type.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over embedded file attachments in a PDF and assign a custom description and appropriate MIME type before saving the document.

save-pdf-with-attachments.title: Save PDF with Attachments to Output Folder
save-pdf-with-attachments.description: Demonstrates adding file attachments to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and saving the modified document to a specified output directory.

list-pdf-attachment-names-sizes.title: List PDF Attachment Names and Sizes
list-pdf-attachment-names-sizes.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its embedded files collection, and iterates through each attachment to display the attachment name and its size in bytes.

extract-specific-attachment-from-pdf.title: Extract Specific Attachment from PDF
extract-specific-attachment-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate an embedded file by name, and save it to a local directory.

extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.title: Extract PDF Attachments to Separate Subfolders
extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its embedded file attachments, and write each attachment into its own subdirectory.

remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.title: Remove PDF Attachment by Index
remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.description: Demonstrates how to delete an embedded file from a PDF using its zero‑based index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.title: Delete PDF Attachment by Filename
delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.description: Demonstrates how to remove an embedded file from a PDF by specifying its filename using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.title: Extract PDF Attachment Metadata to JSON
extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF document, locate file attachment annotations, retrieve their file name and creation date, and serialize the collected metadata to a JSON file.

update-attachment-description-in-pdf.title: Update PDF Attachment Description
update-attachment-description-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate file attachment annotations in a PDF, modify the attached file's description, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-to-password-protected-pdf.title: Add Attachment to Password-Protected PDF
add-attachment-to-password-protected-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf, embedding a file as an attachment, and saving the document while preserving its encryption.

extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Attachments from Encrypted PDF
extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Opens an encrypted PDF with a password, decrypts it, and extracts all embedded file attachments to a specified output folder.

add-file-attachment-with-size-validation.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Size Validation
add-file-attachment-with-size-validation.description: The example checks that a file does not exceed a 5 MB limit before attaching it to a PDF as a file attachment annotation, then saves the updated document.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files and embed the same external file as an attachment into each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-pdf-attachments-to-zip.title: Batch Extract PDF Attachments to a ZIP Archive
batch-extract-pdf-attachments-to-zip.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, iterates over its embedded files, and writes those attachments into a consolidated ZIP file with a folder structure based on the source PDF name.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio and Add Files
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF Portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, add multiple files as attachments, set document metadata, and save the portfolio PDF.

add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Word Document to PDF Portfolio
add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed a Word (.docx) file into a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf's Document.Collection.Add method.

insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Insert Excel Workbook into PDF Portfolio with Description
insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed an Excel workbook into a PDF portfolio and assign a custom description using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Embed Image into PDF Portfolio with Display Name
embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed an image file into a PDF portfolio and assign a custom display name for the attachment using Aspose.Pdf.

add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.title: Add Nested PDF to an Existing PDF Portfolio
add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file as a nested item inside an existing PDF Portfolio using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Multiple Files to a PDF Portfolio
add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed several files of different types into a single PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf in one loop. The example creates a container PDF, adds a page, and attaches each existing file as an embedded file.

compress-pdf-portfolio-using-optimizatio.title: Compress PDF Portfolio Using Optimization Options
compress-pdf-portfolio-using-optimizatio.description: Loads an existing PDF portfolio, enables object compression via OptimizationOptions, and saves the compressed portfolio to a specified output path.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Loads a PDF portfolio, iterates through its embedded files, and writes each file to a structured directory while preserving any folder hierarchy encoded in the attachment names.

extract-embedded-file-by-index.title: Extract Embedded File from PDF by Index
extract-embedded-file-by-index.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate an embedded file by its 1‑based index, and save the extracted content using the original file name and extension.

remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Remove Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific embedded file from a PDF portfolio using its zero‑based collection index and save the updated document.

delete-pdf-outline-items-by-description.title: Delete PDF Outline Items by Description
delete-pdf-outline-items-by-description.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, finding outline (bookmark) entries whose titles match a specified list, and removing those entries by title.

reorder-pdf-bookmarks.title: Reorder PDF Bookmarks (Outlines)
reorder-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to delete existing PDF outlines and add them back in a new sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-visual-template-to-pdf-port.title: Apply Custom Visual Template to PDF Portfolio
apply-custom-visual-template-to-pdf-port.description: The example loads a PDF Portfolio, adds a background rectangle, a header banner, and a text label to each page using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing classes, then saves the modified document.

generate-portfolio-thumbnails.title: Generate Thumbnails for Portfolio PDF Pages
generate-portfolio-thumbnails.description: Creates a new PDF that contains thumbnail images of each page from an existing portfolio PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Drawing and ThumbnailDevice APIs.

merge-pdf-portfolios-preserving-metadata.title: Merge Two PDF Portfolios Preserving Metadata
merge-pdf-portfolios-preserving-metadata.description: Shows how to combine two PDF portfolios into one document while retaining embedded files and their metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-embedded-files.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio-with-embedded-files.description: Shows how to convert an existing PDF into a PDF Portfolio by adding multiple embedded files using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-portfolio.title: Flatten PDF Portfolio to Standard PDF
flatten-pdf-portfolio.description: Loads a PDF Portfolio, removes its interactive collection features using the Flatten method, and saves it as a regular PDF file.

read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.title: Read PDF Metadata and Count Attachments
read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract standard document metadata, count embedded file attachments, and generate a simple text report.

generate-csv-report-of-pdf-attachments.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Attachments
generate-csv-report-of-pdf-attachments.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its embedded file attachments, extracts each attachment's name, size, and description, and writes the information to a CSV report.

add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add In-Memory Attachment to PDF Using MemoryStream
add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a MemoryStream, create an attachment entirely in memory, embed it into the PDF, and save the result without creating intermediate files on disk.

add-remote-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Remote File Attachment to PDF
add-remote-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Downloads a file from a remote URL into memory and embeds it into an existing PDF as a file attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.description: The example loads a PDF, checks that both the PDF and attachment files exist, creates a file attachment annotation, adds it to the first page, and saves the result while handling missing files and PDF processing errors.

validate-attachment-mime-type-add-to-pdf.title: Validate Attachment MIME Type and Add to PDF
validate-attachment-mime-type-add-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to verify that an attachment's MIME type matches its file extension before embedding it into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

measure-attachment-performance.title: Measure Performance of Adding, Extracting, and Removing PDF Attachments
measure-attachment-performance.description: Demonstrates how to add an embedded file to a PDF, extract all attachments, and delete them while logging the elapsed time for each operation using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-attachment-metadata-into-pdf.title: Embed Attachment and Metadata into PDF
embed-attachment-metadata-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add a file attachment to a PDF and store attachment metadata in the document information dictionary using Aspose.Pdf save options.

add-unicode-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Unicode File Attachment to PDF
add-unicode-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file with a Unicode filename into a PDF and display it using a file attachment annotation with Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256-hash.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256-hash.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates over its embedded files, extracts each attachment into memory, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for integrity verification.

add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF document, adds a semi‑transparent text watermark to each page using a WatermarkArtifact, and saves the watermarked file.

add-file-attachment-with-retry.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Retry
add-file-attachment-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF stored on a network share and implement a retry mechanism for transient I/O errors.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdfs-in-para.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDFs in Parallel
extract-embedded-files-from-pdfs-in-para.description: Demonstrates how to load multiple PDF documents concurrently, enumerate their embedded files, and save each attachment to a designated folder using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-pdf-size-after-attachment.title: Verify PDF Size Increases After Adding Attachment
verify-pdf-size-after-attachment.description: Creates a minimal PDF, adds a file attachment annotation, saves the modified document, and asserts that the PDF file size grows as expected.

test-attachment-removal-updates-count.title: Test Attachment Removal Updates Collection Count
test-attachment-removal-updates-count.description: Shows how removing an Attachment from a ThreadMessageResponse updates the Attachments collection count, verified with NUnit assertions.

embed-xml-metadata-hidden-attachment.title: Embed XML Metadata as Hidden Attachment in PDF
embed-xml-metadata-hidden-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to serialize XML metadata, embed it as a file attachment, and hide the annotation within a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
